case_title: MARSHA HOFFMAN HEINZ VS. TIMOTHY J. MARTEN MD et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-21-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

MALPRACTICE - MEDICAL/DENTAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEINZ, MARSHA HOFFMAN AS TO DEFENDANT MARTEN MD, TIMOTHY J. MAYERHOFLER, PETER YISUNG, HELEN MARTEN CLINIC OF PLASTIC SURGERY DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-10-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-26-2011
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-21-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-21-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-10-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST MARSHA HOFFMAN HEINZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-21-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-05-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-21-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-21-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (212)
